rationale: Ukraine's battlefield progress continues at the same qualitative level; the US cutting NATO assets in Europe is a new concern for Western support continuity, but no direct aid cut to Ukraine confirmed yet.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory as it doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukrainian forces continue territorial gains and intensify strikes on Russian supply lines — qualitatively similar to last cycle, sustaining battlefield momentum but no major new breakthrough.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: Washington reducing NATO Europe military assets raises concern about long-term Western commitment to the region, potentially signaling reduced support capacity for Ukraine over time.

top_events.title: Iran says deal to end fighting with US has 'never been closer'
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could free up US diplomatic and military attention, potentially redirecting focus and resources back toward Ukraine's support needs.
